sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ عُمَرُ بِالْحُزْنِ حِينَ انْتَقَلَ صَدِيقُهُ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Omer se osjećao tužno kada se njegov prijatelj preselio u drugi grad.
sentences.translationEn: Omar felt sad when his friend moved to another city.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَفْتَقِدُ اللَّعِبَ مَعَهُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Nedostajalo mu je igranje s njim svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: He missed playing with him every day.
They talked on the phone every week.
True friendship does not end with distance.
